calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Carrillo Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff
Robert De La Cruz, Plaintiff
Henry Ramirz and Irma Pineda, Defendants in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled on the record.
The following terms were read into the record:
Defendant, Irma Pineda will be dismissed without prejudice by Plaintiff.
Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 747 Vienna Street, San Francisco, CA by
Defendant to pay Plaintiff the sum of: $4,500.00 for money damages and unpaid rent for the period of 1/1/04-3/31/04
Court to issue writ to schedule eviction, stayed until 3/31/04, 11:59 pm.
No further postponements or delays of eviction beyond that date.
Defendant, Henry Ramirez will return the keys in Plaintiff's mailbox upon his moving out on 3/31/04 by 11:59pm
Plaintiff's cousel will prepare and submitt the Judgment Jury trial vacated.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Christina Paxton

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS HENRY RAMIREZ and IRMA PINEDA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR, first amended complaint filed on 2/19/04. (301/KMM) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
